interpretation_overrides.stance: We require explicit, separately-captured consent re-confirmation for any data shared with banking partners, regardless of base law minimums. Consent obtained as part of a general T&Cs acceptance is not sufficient.
interpretation_overrides.rationale: Banking partner contractual requirement; conservative posture relative to base PDPL standard.

interpretation_overrides.stance: Cross-border data transfers must include a written assessment by the DPO documenting the destination jurisdiction's adequacy status. Standard contractual clauses alone are not sufficient.
interpretation_overrides.rationale: Post-2024 board policy after near-miss with EU regulator inquiry.

interpretation_overrides.stance: We reject indemnity clauses with uncapped liability for any third-party claim. Cap must be the higher of (a) 12 months fees paid by counterparty, or (b) AED 500,000.
interpretation_overrides.rationale: Insurance carrier requirement; standardized across all vendor contracts since Q1 2024.
